title: glandularia herteri
intro: Glandularia herteri, also known as Verbena herteri, is a species of flowering plant in the family Verbenaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to the Americas, and is often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Glandularia herteri include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
